predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality (rechtspersoonlijkheid). A background/prerequisite status that may be directly stated in a case.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company (kleine vennootschap) in the given financial year.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company (moedervennootschap).

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the micro-company employee criterion (annual average > 10) in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the micro-company net turnover criterion (> 900,000 EUR excl. VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the micro-company balance sheet total criterion (> 450,000 EUR) in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three micro-company criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company (microvennootschap) under Art. 1:25 in the given financial year.

predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately before the first financial year.

predicates.name: next_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately after the first financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_for_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: ceases_to_exceed_more_than_one_criterion_for_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company ceases to exceed more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: micro_company_status_change_applies_from
predicates.description: A change in micro-company status takes effect for the company from this financial year, following two consecutive years of exceeding or ceasing to exceed more than one criterion.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company excluding VAT in the financial year, as referred to in Art. 1:26/1.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year.
